poeticParagraphs:
### ![](/images/IMG_3215.jpeg)The island is small. Simple. Private.

### No roads, no traffic, only water and rocks. Birds, trees and space. 

### You come here to be. To write. To think.

### Some come to celebrate something. Others come to say goodbye.

### Fires are lit by the edge of the water, fish are caught and eaten, kayaks glide through the fjord.  

***
pullQuote: It is a place where you can step outside the world for a while.

firstImage.alt: Mirror-still fjord at sunset with mountains

secondImage.alt: Dramatic orange and pink sunset over the Norwegian fjord
